creator: marek.bedy@gmail.com
text:
I have problem to compile freeradius:

===>  Building for freeradius-2.2.3_1
gmake: *** No rule to make target `LDFLAGS'.  Stop.
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/freeradius2.
*** [build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/freeradius2.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net/freeradius2
make
